title: Lightstaff
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|[[The Force/Legends|the Force]]-imbued staff weapon|the [[Long-handle lightsaber|lightsaber staff]], or the [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|saberstaff]]}}
{{Otheruses|staff}}
[[File:Qrrrl_DLotS.jpg|250px|thumb|[[Qrrrl Toq]] with his lightstaff.]]
A '''lightstaff''' was a melee weapon used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] and the period leading up to it. It consisted of an armored wooden stave [[Force weapon|imbued]] with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. A famed [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of that age, [[Qrrrl Toq]], wielded a lightstaff. Another wielder was [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vodo-Siosk Baas]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''
